tasks.label: Build for L476RG: DEBUG
tasks.command: west build -b nucleo_l476rg/stm32l476xx -d stm32/build/nucleo_l476rg stm32/ -- -DOVERLAY_CONFIG=debug.conf && cp stm32/build/nucleo_l476rg/compile_commands.json stm32/build/compile_commands.json

tasks.label: Build for L476RG: DEBUG (Pristine)
tasks.command: west build -b nucleo_l476rg/stm32l476xx -d stm32/build/nucleo_l476rg stm32/ -p always -- -DOVERLAY_CONFIG=debug.conf && cp stm32/build/nucleo_l476rg/compile_commands.json stm32/build/compile_commands.json

tasks.label: Build for ESP32_C6: DEBUG
tasks.command: west build -b esp32c6_devkitc/esp32c6/hpcore -d stm32/build/esp32c6 stm32/ -- -DOVERLAY_CONFIG=debug.conf -DEXTRA_DTC_OVERLAY_FILE=boards/esp32c6_devkitc.overlay && cp stm32/build/esp32c6/compile_commands.json stm32/build/compile_commands.json

tasks.label: Build for ESP32_C6: DEBUG (Pristine)
tasks.command: west build -b esp32c6_devkitc/esp32c6/hpcore -d stm32/build/esp32c6 stm32/ -p always -- -DOVERLAY_CONFIG=debug.conf -DEXTRA_DTC_OVERLAY_FILE=boards/esp32c6_devkitc.overlay && cp stm32/build/esp32c6/compile_commands.json stm32/build/compile_commands.json
